message:
build: track asupersync from upstream git for macOS kqueue fixes

Patches asupersync to track the upstream git master branch instead of
the crates.io release, picking up runtime/reactor fixes (including
macOS kqueue compatibility) faster than crate publication cycles.

Cargo.toml:
- Adds [patch.crates-io] entry for asupersync pointing to
  github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync master branch

Cargo.lock:
- Resolves asupersync from git (d56651a) instead of crates.io registry
- Updates unpatched asupersync git source from 0.2.0 to 0.2.2 (f9098d7)
- All internal crate references (franken-decision, franken-evidence,
  franken-kernel, async_ossl, codec) now resolve against git source

.cargo/rch-overrides.toml (new):
- RCH patch overrides redirecting asupersync dependencies from
  fastmcp_rust and fastapi_rust to upstream repo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
